description: Professional finance career library covering accounting, banking, investments, risk management and financial services.

careers.name: Chartered Accountant (CA)
careers.overview: Chartered Accountant (CA) is a finance profession focused on financial management, investments, analysis, compliance, risk assessment and wealth creation.
careers.whyChoose: Strong salary potential, high industry demand, global opportunities and excellent career progression.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 from any stream, preferably Commerce. Relevant degrees include B.Com, BBA, Economics, Finance and Accounting.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 → B.Com/BBA/Economics → Professional Certification (CA/CFA/CPA/FRM etc.) → Industry Experience.
careers.feeRange: ₹50,000 – ₹20 Lakhs depending on program and certification.
careers.workEnvironment: Banks, investment firms, consulting companies, financial institutions, stock markets and corporate finance departments.
careers.futureScope: Strong growth due to digital banking, investments, wealth management, fintech and global financial markets.
careers.aiImpact: AI automates routine analysis but increases demand for strategic financial planning and advisory expertise.

careers.name: Company Secretary (CS)
careers.overview: Company Secretary (CS) is a commerce and finance career focused on money, accounting, markets, business performance and financial decisions.
careers.whyChoose: Company Secretary (CS) offers stable demand, strong professional pathways and opportunities in business, banking and advisory services.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 Commerce is preferred, though some pathways are open to other streams.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> B.Com/BBA/Economics or professional course -> Internship/articleship -> Job or certification.
careers.feeRange: Rs 50,000-15 Lakhs
careers.workEnvironment: Banks, accounting firms, financial institutions, corporates, consulting firms and government bodies.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to financial planning, taxation, digital banking, investment and compliance demand.
careers.aiImpact: AI will automate routine accounting and reporting while increasing demand for advisory, analytics and judgement.
